hero.label: Marine services
hero.lead: Certified hull, engine and electrical repairs. We operate in 15+ ports worldwide. Quality assurance and on-time delivery.

about.label: About us
about.title: Marine Technical Solutions —
about.text: Founded in 2010, MTS has grown from an engineering start-up into an international EPC contractor and private shipping company. We create the conditions for safe, eco-friendly and profitable vessel operation anywhere in the world.

services.label: Ship Repair
services.heading: Full range of
services.hullDesc: Ultrasonic testing, welding of hull structures
services.engineDesc: Overhaul of main and auxiliary engines

process.label: Process
process.heading: Three steps to
process.step1Text: We take your request, agree on scope and mobilisation timeline.
process.step2Text: We survey the vessel and perform class-compliant work to IACS standards.
process.step3Text: We complete documentation, hand over the job and support under warranty.

cta.label: Contact us
cta.title: Need
cta.text: Contact our technical team. We respond within two hours and prepare a commercial proposal.

about.heroSubtitle: Integrated Approach. Global Reach. Technological Leadership.
about.heroLead: Founded in 2010, Marine Technical Solutions (MTS) has evolved from an ambitious engineering start-up into an international EPC contractor and private shipping company, headquartered in Kaliningrad with a strategic office in the UAE.
about.heroLead2: We do not simply manage vessels — we create the conditions for their safe, eco-friendly and profitable operation anywhere in the world's oceans.
about.ecosystemLead: MTS is a unique structure uniting every aspect of fleet life-support:
about.svc1Text: We assume full responsibility for the technical condition of your asset, implementing modern maintenance standards and cost control.
about.svc2Text: Our pride — mobile teams carrying out repairs and maintenance during the voyage itself. We eliminate off-hire downtime, keeping systems operational without dry-docking.
about.svc3Text: We supply highly qualified Russian crews. Our seafarers are professionals trained to work with complex equipment and modern materials.
about.svc4Text: As EPC experts we actively deploy GRE/GRV composite solutions. Replacing corrosive steel with durable fibreglass is our contribution to reducing your OPEX.
about.missionLead: Our ultimate goal is to become the benchmark in vessel management through continuous learning and investment in people. We operate on the principles of:
about.mission1: Zero Incidents — absolute safety for crew and vessel.
about.mission2: Zero Pollution — technologies that eliminate environmental harm.
about.mission3: Sustainable Management — a transition to green technologies on board and ashore.
about.whyText: We speak the language of results-driven shipowners. Our experience allows us to turn complex technical challenges into transparent and profitable business processes. If you are looking for a reliable management company capable of protecting your fleet and increasing its capitalisation — welcome aboard MTS.
about.certIsoS: Occupational health and safety management system

vacancies.heroLead: Join the Marine Technical Solutions team. We offer roles in ship repair and maritime services. Don't see a role that fits? You can simply fill in our application form — we'll get in touch when something relevant opens up.
vacancies.emptyHtml: There are no open positions right now. Check back later or send your CV to
vacancies.applyNote: Complete the candidate form (only from this vacancy page) — the layout matches the corporate PDF export.

crewing.heroLead: Full crew management for shipowners: from seafarer selection to paperwork and crew-change logistics. We help reduce risk and admin workload so you can focus on safe vessel operation.
crewing.directionsLead: One approach to people at sea: from manning strategy to day-to-day support in ports and ashore.
crewing.d1x: Qualified seafarers matched to vessel and flag requirements, rotation planning and timely crew changes.
crewing.d2x: Contracts, certificates and records aligned with STCW, MLC codes and owner requirements.
crewing.d3x: Verification of diplomas, endorsements and medicals; reminders for renewals and training.
crewing.d4x: Support for crew sign-on/off: visas, tickets, transfers and coordination with port agents.
crewing.d5x: Single point of contact for HR matters: reporting, replacement approvals, captain and office coordination.
crewing.d6x: Structured data on crew composition, contract dates and costs — for forecasting and audit.
crewing.p1: Compliance with international and national maritime labour standards
crewing.p2: Confidentiality of seafarers' and owners' personal data
crewing.p3: Rapid communication in emergencies and urgent crew changes
crewing.audience1: Owners and operators who need predictable crewing and transparent processes without overloading internal HR and fleet teams. Scope and services are tailored to your fleet and trading area.
crewing.audience2: Leave a request to discuss scope and pricing — we will propose a suitable crew management model.

upload.title: Document upload
upload.intro: {name}, please upload the requested files. Link expires:
upload.successNote: Files received. You can upload any remaining documents before the link expires.
upload.uploadErr: Upload failed. Check format (PDF, JPG, PNG, WebP) and size (up to 10 MB).
upload.formatsNote: Allowed formats: PDF, JPEG, PNG, WebP. Maximum file size 10 MB.

vacancyForm.successLeadOpen: We have saved your application in our candidate pool and will contact you when a suitable position opens.

vacancyForm.errPositionOpen: Enter your desired position or rank

vacancyForm.submitErr: Could not submit the application. Check your connection and try again.
vacancyForm.successLead: We have received your details and will contact you if needed.
vacancyForm.formIntro: Step-by-step completion. After submission your data is stored on the server.
vacancyForm.step1p2: . Allow about 15–25 minutes. You can go back with the “Back” button.
vacancyForm.step1OpenHiddenVacancies: Allow about 15–25 minutes. You can go back with the “Back” button.
vacancyForm.step1li1: Documents and certificates follow a fixed list plus optional extra rows.
vacancyForm.step1li2: You may attach a photo from your device.
vacancyForm.step1li3: At the end — personal data processing consents (RU/EN).
vacancyForm.travelHint: If you have other travel documents, fill in the blocks below — you can add several rows.
vacancyForm.compHint: Additional competency certificates — add below; add rows if needed.
vacancyForm.otherHint: Any other certificates in separate blocks; add rows if required.
vacancyForm.consentRu1: I hereby confirm that all information is, to the best of my knowledge, accurate and true...
vacancyForm.consentRu2: By submitting this form I consent to LLC Marine Technical Solutions processing my personal data...
vacancyForm.consentEn1: I confirm that the details given are to the best of my knowledge accurate and true...
vacancyForm.consentEn2: By submitting the application form, I give my consent to LLC "Marine Technical Solutions" for the processing of personal data...
